/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/mu2e_send.dir/tools/mu2e_send.cpp.o -o mu2e_send  libmu2e_sender.a
